channel.title: Boss Kev Curated Newsfeed
channel.description: Curated Malaysia, global, tech, and health headlines ranked by freshness and interest.

item.title: Malaysia Is Running Out Of Caregivers And Time — Rashidi Yahaya
item.description:
Source: CodeBlue (Malaysia Health)
Malaysia requires a long-term care insurance framework that spreads risk across the population and creates a sustainable financing pool, built before the demographic wave hits full force, not after. The post Malaysia Is Running Out Of Caregivers And Time — Rashidi Yahaya appeared first on CodeBlue .
Matched: breaking(+3), urgent(+3), policy(+3), budget(+3), law(+3), parliament(+2), ministry(+2), war(+3), economy(+2), ai(+3), who(+2)

item.title: In defence of Arsenal - is criticism of Premier League leaders unfair?
item.description:
Source: Yahoo Sports (Sports)
In defence of Arsenal - BBC Sport chief football writer Phil McNulty asks is the criticism of the Premier League leaders unfair as they chase four trophies?
Matched: law(+3), war(+3), ai(+3), who(+2), football(+1), premier league(+2), champions league(+2), liverpool(+1), manchester united(+1), arsenal(+1), chelsea(+1)

item.title: China poised to trim growth ambitions, pursue timid rebalancing efforts
item.description:
Source: FMT Business (Finance)
China's National People's Congress begins on March 5 with Beijing expected to set 2026 growth at 4.5–5%.

item.title: Carrick on defenders, corners and confidence
item.description:
Source: Yahoo Sports (Sports)
Manchester United boss Michael Carrick has been speaking to the media before Wednesday's Premier League game against Newcastle at St James' Park (kick-off 20:15 GMT). Defenders Luke Shaw and Harry Maguire could both be fit after going off in the win over Crystal Palace. "It wasn't injury, both weren't feeling too good," said Carrick.
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3), who(+2), aff(+2), football(+1), premier league(+2), manchester united(+1)

item.title: LIAM Alleges Average Medical Insurance Claim Only RM12,000
item.description:
Source: CodeBlue (Malaysia Health)
In defending the RM100k annual limit under the Base MHIT plan, LIAM claims that the average medical claim is only RM12,000, even though many ITOs in the insurance industry regularly tout policies with RM1m or higher annual limits for medical emergencies. The post LIAM Alleges Average Medical Insurance Claim Only RM12,000 appeared first on CodeBlue .
Matched: policy(+3), war(+3), ai(+3), dengue(+3)

item.title: Health PSSC Moots Expansion Of Insurance Coverage For Mental Health Services
item.description:
Source: CodeBlue (Malaysia Health)
The Health PSSC recommends expanding insurance coverage for mental health services, warning that limited coverage is pushing patients to pay out of pocket and straining public hospitals. Preventive care remains largely excluded from insurance. The post Health PSSC Moots Expansion Of Insurance Coverage For Mental Health Services appeared first on CodeBlue .
Matched: parliament(+2), ministry(+2), war(+3), ai(+3), who(+2)

item.title: UK's Reeves promises stability against backdrop of Middle East conflict
item.description:
Source: Straits Times World (Global)
LONDON, March 3 - British finance minister Rachel Reeves said she would provide stability for the economy in a budget update speech on Tuesday that contained no big policy surprises and was overshadowed by alarm among investors over the conflict in the Middle East.
Matched: policy(+3), budget(+3), economy(+2), ai(+3)

item.title: Tunisia jails tycoon Mabrouk and ex-PM Chahed on corruption charges
item.description:
Source: Straits Times World (Global)
TUNIS, March 3 - A Tunisian court on Tuesday sentenced the country's richest businessman, Marouan Mabrouk, son-in-law of former president Zine El Abidine Ben Ali, to 20 years in prison, and former prime minister Youssef Chahed to six years, in corruption cases, lawyers said.
Matched: law(+3), corruption(+3), court(+2), ai(+3)

item.title: Expert: Gradually Replace PTDs In MOH With Public Health, Allied Health Professionals
item.description:
Source: CodeBlue (Malaysia Health)
A public health medicine specialist (PHMS) wants a study to identify MOH's admin posts held by PTDs that can be gradually filled by PHMS or allied health professionals trained in health system management. PTDs are still relevant in some areas in HQ/state. The post Expert: Gradually Replace PTDs In MOH With Public Health, Allied Health Professionals appeared first on CodeBlue .
Matched: policy(+3), ministry(+2), ai(+3), who(+2)

item.title: How the new iPhone 17E stacks up against Apple’s pricier phones
item.description:
Source: The Verge
The iPhone 17 lineup now has a “budget” option. Announced this week, the iPhone 17E will hit stores on Wednesday, March 11th, starting at $599, with preorders opening on March 4th. The 6.1-inch phone joins the rest of Apple’s iPhone 17 lineup, which includes the iPhone 17 ($799), the more powerful iPhone 17 Pro ($1,099), […]

item.title: When Bariatric Surgery is Dismissed As ‘Cosmetic’: What We Are Missing
item.description:
Source: CodeBlue (Malaysia Health)
Bariatric surgery is often dismissed as “cosmetic”, but it is a medical intervention for severe obesity and metabolic disease. It drives significant weight loss, reduces metabolic comorbidities like diabetes and hypertension, and improves quality of life. The post When Bariatric Surgery is Dismissed As ‘Cosmetic’: What We Are Missing appeared first on CodeBlue .
Matched: policy(+3), ai(+3), who(+2), diabetes(+2)

item.description:
Source: Free Malaysia Today
Fahmi Zainol says his ex officio seat in the PKR state chapter should remain intact, as he continues to serve as the Pantai Jerejak assemblyman and state executive councillor.
Matched: court(+2), war(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: Lebanon sucked deeper into war as Hezbollah, Israel trade blows
item.description:
Source: Straits Times World (Global)
BEIRUT/JERUSALEM, March 3 - Lebanon was pulled deeper into the war in the Middle East on Tuesday as the Iran-backed Lebanese group Hezbollah launched missiles at Israel for a second consecutive day and Israel sent troops into the south and carried out waves of air strikes.
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3), launch(+2)

item.title: Qatar says Iran didn’t warn of missile attacks, no comms with Tehran
item.description:
Source: Al Jazeera (Global)

item.title: Russia says war could backfire by spurring Iran and Arab nations to seek nuclear weapons
item.description:
Source: Straits Times World (Global)
MOSCOW, March 3 - Russia warned on Tuesday that the war launched by the U.S. and Israel against Iran could result in the very outcome they were seeking to prevent, by spurring both Iran and its Arab neighbours to seek to acquire nuclear weapons.
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3), launch(+2)

item.title: Jamie Dimon says Trump’s $5 billion debanking lawsuit ‘has no merit’ but he’s sympathetic to concerns
item.description:
Source: CNBC Markets (Finance)
The suit against JPMorgan, the world's biggest bank by market cap, and its CEO puts Dimon in an awkward position.
Matched: law(+3), war(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: A bold new plan could finally cure type 1 diabetes
item.description:
Source: ScienceDaily Health (Health)
Researchers are developing a two-part therapy for type 1 diabetes: lab-made insulin-producing cells paired with custom-engineered immune cells that protect them. The goal is to stop the immune system from destroying transplanted cells — without using immunosuppressive drugs. Backed by $1 million in funding, the team hopes to create a ready-to-use treatment that could work even for people who have had diabetes for years. The approach could transform how the disease is treated.
Matched: ai(+3), funding(+2), who(+2), diabetes(+2)

item.title: Over Half Of Hospital Patients At Risk Of Disease-Related Malnutrition, Say Dietitians
item.description:
Source: CodeBlue (Malaysia Health)
The Malaysian Dietitians’ Association says over half of hospital patients – and up to 70% among cancer patients – are at risk of disease-related malnutrition, doubling readmission risk and raising costs by 20-30%. Medical nutrition therapy is not covered by insurance. The post Over Half Of Hospital Patients At Risk Of Disease-Related Malnutrition, Say Dietitians appeared first on CodeBlue .
Matched: parliament(+2), ai(+3), who(+2), cancer(+2)

item.title: Turkey eyes lifting U.S. CAATSA sanctions before U.S. midterms
item.description:
Source: Straits Times World (Global)
ANKARA, March 3 - Turkish Foreign Minister Hakan Fidan said work was underway with the United States to lift sanctions imposed on Ankara before the U.S. midterm elections in November, but added Israel was opposed to the potential move.
Matched: sanctions(+2), election(+2), ai(+3)

item.title: No one has a good plan for how AI companies should work with the government
item.description:
Source: TechCrunch
As OpenAI transitions from a wildly successful consumer startup into a piece of national security infrastructure, the company seems unequipped to manage its new responsibilities.
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3), startup(+2)

item.title: Florida restricts access to HIV drugs for thousands
item.description:
Source: Healio News (Health)
The Florida Department of Health imposed an emergency rule on Sunday that could prevent thousands of lower-income or uninsured people from being able to pay for their HIV medication. The rule drastically cut funding and eligibility for the state’s AIDS Drug Assistance Program (ADAP), impacting an estimated 16,000 residents, according to the HIV Medicine Association. The cuts were driven by a reported $120 million budget deficit, rising insurance premiums and declining federal assistance. Previously, eligibility for the program was capped at 400% of the federal poverty level — which is under
Matched: budget(+3), ai(+3), funding(+2)

item.title: EVP Beats Cisplatin for Resectable MIBC
item.description:
Source: Medscape (Health)
As the first chemotherapy-free regimen to beat gemcitabine/cisplatin, perioperative enfortumab vedotin plus pembrolizumab could shift muscle-invasive bladder cancer care — but questions remain. Medscape Medical News
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3), cancer(+2)

item.title: Parade’s Cami Tellez announces new creator economy marketing platform, $4M in funding
item.description:
Source: TechCrunch
Cami Tellez announces launch of new company, $4 million raise.
Matched: economy(+2), ai(+3), funding(+2), launch(+2)

item.title: Public Sector Short Of Over 13,000 Specialists To Meet 2030 Needs: MOH
item.description:
Source: CodeBlue (Malaysia Health)
According to MOH data, Malaysia’s public health care sector needs 22,435 specialist doctors by 2030, compared to 9,040 currently in service – a shortfall of 13,395. At current output, only 4,000 to 5,600 specialists would be produced by 2030, less than half the gap. The post Public Sector Short Of Over 13,000 Specialists To Meet 2030 Needs: MOH appeared first on CodeBlue .
Matched: ministry(+2), war(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: Greek shipping minister warns of alarming situation in Strait of Hormuz
item.description:
Source: Straits Times World (Global)
ATHENS, March 3 - Greece's shipping minister on Tuesday called for the protection of global shipping and seafarers, amid an \"alarming\" situation that has left dozens of ships stranded in the Strait of Hormuz and the wider area due to the widening Iran conflict.
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: ‘Russian oil will be sought’: What are Moscow’s gains from the war in Iran?
item.description:
Source: Al Jazeera (Global)
Russia, one of Iran's few allies, could profit from the war as it navigates diplomatic relations with Iran and Israel.
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: Alopecia Areata May Raise Risk for Autoimmune Diseases
item.description:
Source: Medscape (Health)
Patients with new-onset alopecia areata are at increased 10-year risk of developing several immune-mediated inflammatory diseases, according to a study. Medscape Medical News
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: Israel uses cargo ships to repatriate doctors stranded abroad by war
item.description:
Source: Straits Times World (Global)
JERUSALEM, March 3 - Israeli authorities are using container ships to bring back dozens of essential medical staff stuck abroad after the air war with Iran broke out on Saturday, disrupting travel, according to Israel's cargo firm ZIM Shipping.
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: Al Jazeera investigation: Iran girls’ school targeting likely ‘deliberate’
item.description:

item.title: Analysis – Trump’s foreign policy message in a nutshell: ‘We can reach you’
item.description:
Source: Al Jazeera (Global)
Trump makes adversaries and reluctant partners central to his politics, pairing direct threats with transactional deals.
Matched: policy(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: Trump says US war supplies mean it can fight 'forever'
item.description:
Source: Straits Times World (Global)
WASHINGTON, March 3 - Donald Trump said the U.S. military has enough stockpiled weapons to fight wars \"forever\", as the Republican president and his administration continued their push to justify a broad, open-ended war on Iran with shifting aims and timeline.
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: Changes in Body Image and Pain Tied to Depression in Cushing
item.description:
Source: Medscape (Health)
A recent longitudinal cohort study shows a statistically significant relationship between body image disturbance, pain, and persistent depression in patients with Cushing syndrome. Medscape News UK
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: UK yet to decide on sending warship to defend Cyprus base
item.description:
Source: Straits Times World (Global)
LONDON, March 3 - Britain has yet to decide whether it will send a warship to defend its Royal Air Force Akrotiri base in Cyprus, a source close to the matter said on Tuesday after the Times newspaper reported ministers had discussed such a deployment.
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: UN chief warns of Israeli-made humanitarian crisis in Gaza amid war on Iran
item.description:
Source: Al Jazeera (Global)
Crossings have been shut since Saturday as the displaced population of Gaza remains dependent on humanitarian aid.
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: Turkey says it's engaging with all sides to end Iran war, resume diplomacy
item.description:
Source: Straits Times World (Global)
ANKARA, March 3 - Turkey is engaging with all parties to find a way to end the war in Iran and return to negotiations, Foreign Minister Hakan Fidan said, adding that Ankara was also in talks with Oman on the matter as the Gulf nation works for the same goal.

item.title: A married founder duo’s company, 14.ai, is replacing customer support teams at startups
item.description:

14.ai also launched a consumer brand to understand how much AI can handle customer support tasks.
Matched: ai(+3), startup(+2), launch(+2)

item.title: US imposes sanctions on Rwanda military over east Congo fighting
item.description:
Source: Straits Times World (Global)
WASHINGTON, March 2 - The U.S. on Monday imposed sanctions on the Rwanda Defence Force and top military officials over their role in ongoing fighting in eastern Democratic Republic of Congo and called for their immediate withdrawal from the mineral-rich region.
Matched: sanctions(+2), ai(+3)

item.title: Apple announces M5 MacBook Air and updated MacBook Pro
item.description:
Source: The Verge
Apple is launching an upgraded MacBook Air featuring the M5 chip along with new MacBook Pro models featuring the M5 Pro and M5 Max. Announced on Tuesday, the new Macs will all be available for pre-order starting March 4th with availability in stores starting March 11th. In addition to the M5 chip, the new MacBook […]
Matched: ai(+3), launch(+2)

item.title: GoPro’s next cameras are coming soon with a brand-new chip
item.description:
Source: The Verge
GoPro has announced a new processor today that the company says will "power GoPro's next generation of cameras across current and future products" - and will debut in cameras launching in Q2 2026. There were no details shared about what cameras GoPro plans to launch in the coming months, but the company says its new […]
Matched: ai(+3), launch(+2)

item.title: Oral insulin fails to slow type 1 diabetes progression
item.description:
Source: Healio News (Health)
High-dose oral insulin did not reduce risk for progression to type 1 diabetes among children with stage 1 disease, according to data from a phase 2 trial published in Diabetes Care. In the Fr1da Insulin Intervention trial conducted in Germany, 220 children aged 2 to 12 years with stage 1 type 1 diabetes were randomly assigned to once-daily oral insulin (Eli Lilly) or placebo for 1 year (50.9% girls; median age, 4.8 years). Children were considered to have stage 1 type 1 diabetes if they tested positive for more than one type 1 diabetes autoantibody and had normal glucose levels at baseline.
Matched: ai(+3), diabetes(+2)

item.title: Persistent smokers face lower Parkinson’s risks vs. quitters
item.description:
Source: Healio News (Health)
Adults who quit smoking had a heightened risk for Parkinson’s disease vs. those who continued to smoke, according to results published in Neurology. However, those reporting quitting had a reduced risk for all-cause mortality vs. those who continued smoking, according to researchers. “Our study suggests a lower risk of Parkinson’s is not necessarily associated with how long someone smokes, but rather if they are currently smoking,” Jun-Hyuk Lee, MD, PhD, assistant professor at Eulji University School of Medicine in South Korea, said in a press release related to the study. Using data from the
Matched: ai(+3), who(+2)

item.title: ‘Trump didn’t follow legal proceedings to launch this war’
item.description:
Source: Al Jazeera (Global)
'Trump left all options open for when he would be bored with this to decide it's done and find a way to declare victory'
Matched: war(+3), launch(+2)

item.title: Singaporeans in Middle East asked to indicate interest in 'assisted departure' amid airport closures
item.description:
Source: Channel NewsAsia (Global)
The Ministry of Foreign Affairs said it is conducting a survey to gauge interest and stressed that no evacuation has been announced.
Matched: ministry(+2), ai(+3)

item.title: European capitals push back as Ukraine seeks fast-track EU membership
item.description:
Source: Straits Times World (Global)
BRUSSELS, March 3 - Ukraine’s push for a fast track into the European Union as part of any peace deal has hit stiff resistance from EU governments, who do not want to open the Pandora’s box of problems that they fear a quick accession would unleash.
Matched: ai(+3), who(+2)

item.title: US homeland chief Noem to face scrutiny on immigration crackdown at Senate hearing
item.description:
Source: Straits Times World (Global)
WASHINGTON, March 3 - U.S. Department of Homeland Security Secretary Kristi Noem is expected to face tough questions over President Donald Trump's immigration crackdown during a Senate hearing on Tuesday, with funding for her department still stalled due to Democratic objections to its aggressive tactics.
Matched: ai(+3), funding(+2)

item.title: IHH Healthcare Malaysia Marks Third Consecutive Year in Newsweek’s World’s Best Hospitals 2026 Rankings
item.description:

The continued recognition reflects governance systems that are firmly established across its hospitals, with patient safety and care standards applied consistently across specialties and services. The post IHH Healthcare Malaysia Marks Third Consecutive Year in Newsweek’s World’s Best Hospitals 2026 Rankings appeared first on CodeBlue .

item.title: Instagram tracked growing usage while targeting teens, lawyers argue
item.description:
Source: TechCrunch
The company said usage grew from 40 minutes per day in 2023 to 46 minutes in 2026. Other documents referenced teens as being a top priority for the app before asking existing users for birthdays.
Matched: law(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: Apple’s cheapest AirPods have hit $89
item.description:
Source: The Verge
It’s a good day for Apple fans on a budget. Not only did the company introduce a new budget phone, its entry-level AirPods 4 are also on sale. Right now, you can snag a pair of Apple’s AirPods 4 starting at just $89 ($30 off) at Walmart. The model with active noise-cancellation are also down […]
Matched: budget(+3), ai(+3)
